task_completion.description: Import the retail customers from existing_customers.csv into Copper POS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Copper POS application showing a populated customer list, or an import dialog indicating successful import of the existing customers.

task_completion.description: Add the six corporate clients with their respective details and notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Copper POS customer list or customer detail windows showing the new corporate clients (Pacific Northwest Distributors, Midwest Retail Holdings, Southern Fashion Group, Great Lakes Supply Co., Atlantic Coast Trading, Mountain West Goods) with their tiers and credit limits recorded in the notes.

task_completion.description: Update the notes for Sheryl Baxter, Preston Lozano, and Roy Berry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Copper POS customer list or detail windows showing the updated notes for Sheryl Baxter ('Preferred Account: Yes'), Preston Lozano ('Preferred Account: Yes'), and Roy Berry ('Preferred Account: No, Past Due Balance').

task_completion.description: Export the final customer list to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\customer_accounts.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in Copper POS exporting the customer list to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\customer_accounts.csv, or the file 'customer_accounts.csv' visible on the Desktop at the end of the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Copper Point of Sale application to manage customers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Copper POS application is visible and actively used in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The final CSV was exported using the Copper POS GUI, not created via terminal or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export process is visible within the Copper POS interface, and no terminal or scripting tools are used to generate the final CSV.

integrity.description: The agent entered the corporate client data into the POS system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the customer entry forms being filled out in Copper POS or the customer list being updated within the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires importing 30 existing customers, adding 6 specific corporate clients (Pacific Northwest Distributors, Midwest Retail Holdings, Southern Fashion Group, Great Lakes Supply Co., Atlantic Coast Trading, Mountain West Goods) with their respective tiers and credit limits in the notes, and updating notes for Sheryl Baxter, Preston Lozano, and Roy Berry. The final list must be exported to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\customer_accounts.csv.
